{

    "test:e2e:headed": "playwright test --headed",
    "validate": "npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build",

  },

    "better-auth": "^1.4.3",
    "cheerio": "^1.1.2",
    "class-variance-authority": "^0.7.1",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "dotenv": "^17.2.3",
    "drizzle-orm": "^0.45.2",
    "framer-motion": "^12.23.24",
    "js-yaml": "^4.1.1",
    "lucide-react": "^0.555.0",
    "next": "^16.1.6",
    "next-themes": "^0.4.6",

);

arguments.message: UPDATE: I found the discrepancy schema and API route. I’m implementing a minimal persistence change: add nullable creditReportId to bureau_discrepancies, thread creditReportId through account and PII discrepancy writes, and make the discrepancies GET endpoint optionally filter by reportId while keeping clientId-only behavior. I’ll add/update targeted tests for same-client different-pull isolation and report-aware filtering, then run targeted tests plus typecheck and lint.

// Bureau discrepancies (cross-bureau comparison findings)
export const bureauDiscrepancies = pgTable('bureau_discrepancies', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  clientId: text('client_id').notNull().references(() => clients.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  creditReportId: text('credit_report_id').references(() => creditReports.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  discrepancyType: text('discrepancy_type').notNull(), // 'pii_name' | 'pii_address' | 'account_status' | 'account_balance' | 'account_missing' | 'payment_history' | 'date_mismatch'
  field: text('field'), // The specific field with discrepancy
  creditorName: text('creditor_name'), // For account-related discrepancies
  accountNumber: text('account_number'), // Masked account number
  valueTransunion: text('value_transunion'),
  valueExperian: text('value_experian'),
  valueEquifax: text('value_equifax'),
  severity: text('severity').default('medium'), // 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
  isDisputable: boolean('is_disputable').default(true),
  disputeRecommendation: text('dispute_recommendation'),
  notes: text('notes'),
  resolvedAt: timestamp('resolved_at'),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
}, (table) => [
  index("bureau_discrepancies_clientId_idx").on(table.clientId),
  index("bureau_discrepancies_creditReportId_idx").on(table.creditReportId),
  index("bureau_discrepancies_type_idx").on(table.discrepancyType),
]);

// FCRA compliance tracking (items past reporting limits)
export const fcraComplianceItems = pgTable('fcra_compliance_items', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  clientId: text('client_id').notNull().references(() => clients.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  negativeItemId: text('negative_item_id').references(() => negativeItems.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  creditAccountId: text('credit_account_id').references(() => creditAccounts.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  itemType: text('item_type').notNull(), // 'collection' | 'charge_off' | 'bankruptcy' | 'late_payment' | etc.
  creditorName: text('creditor_name').notNull(),
  dateOfFirstDelinquency: timestamp('date_of_first_delinquency'),
  dofdConfidence: text('dofd_confidence'),
  fcraExpirationDate: timestamp('fcra_expiration_date'), // When item should fall off

// Bureau discrepancies (cross-bureau comparison findings)
export const bureauDiscrepancies = pgTable('bureau_discrepancies', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  clientId: text('client_id').notNull().references(() => clients.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  creditReportId: text('credit_report_id').references(() => creditReports.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  discrepancyType: text('discrepancy_type').notNull(), // 'pii_name' | 'pii_address' | 'account_status' | 'account_balance' | 'account_missing' | 'payment_history' | 'date_mismatch'
  field: text('field'), // The specific field with discrepancy
  creditorName: text('creditor_name'), // For account-related discrepancies
  accountNumber: text('account_number'), // Masked account number
  valueTransunion: text('value_transunion'),
  valueExperian: text('value_experian'),
  valueEquifax: text('value_equifax'),
  severity: text('severity').default('medium'), // 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
  isDisputable: boolean('is_disputable').default(true),
  disputeRecommendation: text('dispute_recommendation'),
  notes: text('notes'),
  resolvedAt: timestamp('resolved_at'),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
}, (table) => [
  index("bureau_discrepancies_clientId_idx").on(table.clientId),
  index("bureau_discrepancies_creditReportId_idx").on(table.creditReportId),
  index("bureau_discrepancies_type_idx").on(table.discrepancyType),
]);

// FCRA compliance tracking (items past reporting limits)

  field: text('field'), // The specific field with discrepancy

  accountNumber: text('account_number'), // Masked account number
  valueTransunion: text('value_transunion'),

}, (table) => [

text:
Implemented the P1.2 persistence/read/write scope:

- Added `creditReportId` threading to discrepancy writes in `credit-analysis` and `credit-analysis-discrepancies`.
- Made the discrepancies API accept optional `reportId` while preserving `clientId`-only queries.
- Added migration `drizzle/0034_bureau_discrepancies_credit_report_id.sql` and journal entry.
- Added/updated tests for same-client different-pull isolation and report-aware filtering.

Verified with:
- `npm test -- --run src/lib/__tests__/credit-analysis-discrepancies.test.ts src/__tests__/api/admin/discrepancies.test.ts` ✅
- `npm run typecheck` ✅
- `npm run lint -- ...targeted files...` ✅

Residual risks:
- Existing unrelated worktree changes were present in `git status`; not touched by this task.
- The new filter is API-only; no UI consumers were updated.

content.text:
Implemented the P1.2 persistence/read/write scope:

- Added `creditReportId` threading to discrepancy writes in `credit-analysis` and `credit-analysis-discrepancies`.
- Made the discrepancies API accept optional `reportId` while preserving `clientId`-only queries.
- Added migration `drizzle/0034_bureau_discrepancies_credit_report_id.sql` and journal entry.
- Added/updated tests for same-client different-pull isolation and report-aware filtering.

Verified with:
- `npm test -- --run src/lib/__tests__/credit-analysis-discrepancies.test.ts src/__tests__/api/admin/discrepancies.test.ts` ✅
- `npm run typecheck` ✅
- `npm run lint -- ...targeted files...` ✅

Residual risks:
- Existing unrelated worktree changes were present in `git status`; not touched by this task.
- The new filter is API-only; no UI consumers were updated.

```acceptance-report

      "evidence": "Discrepancy persistence now carries creditReportId, GET supports optional reportId filtering, and writes/tests are scoped to report-level behavior without UI refactors."
    },
    {
      "id": "criterion-2",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "Targeted vitest, typecheck, and lint all passed; migration file was added and included in verification evidence."
    }
  ],

    "src/lib/credit-analysis-discrepancies.ts",
    "src/lib/credit-analysis.ts",
    "src/app/api/admin/disputes/discrepancies/route.ts",
    "src/lib/__tests__/credit-analysis-discrepancies.test.ts",
    "src/__tests__/api/admin/discrepancies.test.ts",
    "drizzle/0034_bureau_discrepancies_credit_report_id.sql",
    "drizzle/meta/_journal.json"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [

    "src/__tests__/api/admin/discrepancies.test.ts"
  ],
  "commandsRun": [

      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "3 targeted tests passed."
    },
    {
      "command": "npm run typecheck",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "TypeScript strict check passed."
    },
    {
      "command": "npm run lint -- src/lib/__tests__/credit-analysis-discrepancies.test.ts src/__tests__/api/admin/discrepancies.test.ts src/lib/credit-analysis-discrepancies.ts src/lib/credit-analysis.ts src/app/api/admin/disputes/discrepancies/route.ts",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "ESLint passed with only the existing Browserslist age warning."
    },
    {

    "Lint: passed; Browserslist warning only."
  ],

  ],
```
